entries.source: Philosophy Lab
entries.value: Laboratoire de philosophie

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Le mode d’apprentissage IA Philosophy Lab est une façon ciblée d’utiliser l’IA pour apprendre plutôt que de collecter passivement des réponses. Le mode est construit autour d’un objectif précis : Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful raisonnement.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mode d’apprentissage IA Philosophy Lab : guide pratique

entries.value: Prompts et boucle d’étude de Philosophy Lab

entries.value: IA tuteur de philosophie

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthèse : le processus que les plantes utilisent pour produire leur nourriture.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Choisissez n'importe quel sujet et lancez-vous dans un quiz ciblé de 10 questions à choix multiples. Répondez à une question à la fois, obtenez un retour immédiat et terminez avec un score et une révision.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Choisissez n'importe quel sujet et lancez-vous dans un vrai débat. Choisissez un camp, relevez le défi et apprenez à construire de meilleurs arguments.

entries.value: Préparez des discours, des présentations, des entretiens ou des examens oraux avec des invites, un chronométrage et des commentaires sur la structure.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: Préparez des ressources d'étude pour vos camarades ou un groupe : résumés, liens, notes, explications et conseils d'utilisation.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the apprenant knows the topic sequence.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify point faibles, and strengthen the apprenant's raisonnement.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public apprentissage IA platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses IA to widen access while keeping the apprenant active: indices before réponses, questions before lectures, and pratique after explanation.

entries.source: Project Coach
entries.value: Coach de projet

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Le mode d’apprentissage IA Project Coach est une façon ciblée d’utiliser l’IA pour apprendre plutôt que de collecter passivement des réponses. Le mode est construit autour d’un objectif précis : Planifier a école, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
